snapshot.valuationPolicy: Indicative Jupiter Price API V3 values at the recorded block IDs; not executable quotes. Low-liquidity and unverified token values are not treated as guaranteed realizable proceeds.

historyCoverage.snapshotSemantics: Complete for this address as of newestSignature/toUtc; later transactions can naturally appear after the snapshot.

decodedSample.strategy: latest 2,000 address-referencing transactions fully decoded with log-stack CPI frames
decodedSample.caveat: Counts and volumes describe this decoded window, not all 202,066 historical signatures. Failed transactions contribute method attempts but no finalized state transition.

splTokenAndToken2022.access: direct CH token-account owner; no current delegates

xplaceProgram2.access: program-controlled; CH is embedded operational authority, not token-account owner and not upgrade authority; movement remains instruction/constraint bound

xplaceProgram1.access: program-controlled; CH is embedded operational authority, not token-account owner and not upgrade authority

kamino.access: no direct CH-owned position; observed via XPlace-owned user/obligation accounts

drift.access: no Drift User account whose authority is CH; observed via XPlace proxy accounts

jupiter.access: direct JLP token holding plus observed route execution

orcaRaydiumMeteora.access: observed swap routes only in decoded sample

instructionSurface.source: Anchor labels and source-path symbols extracted from the current on-chain ProgramData binary
Anchor labels and source-path symbols extracted from the current on-chain ProgramData binary

jupiter.note: The no-key lite endpoint returned HTTP 200 for this captured snapshot; current official documentation uses api.jup.ag with an API key.

limitations: The full signature crawl is complete at signature level for the recorded snapshot, while instruction-level decoding is complete for the latest 2,000 transactions plus an earlier stratified sample.

Binary method presence is not access proof. Access claims require a successful observed signer layout and remain limited by account, whitelist, token, oracle, balance, limit, downstream-program and atomic-bundle checks.
Routed DEX AddLiquidity/Deposit/Withdraw CPIs can be transient swap mechanics. They are not counted as persistent CH liquidity positions without a CH-owned position/share/NFT account.
XPlace-managed user collateral, debt, card balances and all program-owned rent are not added to CH direct net worth.
Recent-window token deltas are flow volume, not current balances and not all-time volume.

legacyDecodedSample.strategy: temporal-stratified finalized transaction sample plus direct live-flow verification

xplace1.interpretation: The 5,066 UserAccount records are per-user XPlace state. Their lamports and protocol positions are not direct CH funds. The 1,886 links matching current XPlace 2 CardAccount records are a snapshot join; unmatched links can reflect inactive/migrated/versioned card state.

xplace2.interpretation: The 3,168 CardAccount records encode per-card limits/state and are not direct CH balances.
